case_title: WAYNE CHUNG MD VS. OFFICE OF ADMINISTRATIVE HEARINGS
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PERSONAL SERVICE: OPPOSITION TO APP FOR AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME; DECLARATION OF L MERCER, OPPPOSITION BY THE MED'L BOARD TO REQUEST TO SERVE P&A EXCEEDING THE PAGE LIMIT FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. THE PETITION IS MOOT IN LIGHT OF THE SUBSEQUENT HEARING. RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. CCP SECTION 128.5 ONLY APPLIES TO PRE-DECEMBER 31, 1994 COMPLAINTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Sep-03-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Fleer of Rankin Sproat Mires Beatty & Reynolds (510.465.3922) for petitioner and moving party
Larry Mercer of the Office of the Attorney General (703.5539) for real party in interest

Argued and the Court modified its ruling as follows: PETITIONER WAYNE CHUNG'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS is denied. The petition is moot in light of the subsequent hearing. Respondent's request for sanctions is denied. CCP section 128.5 only applies to pre-December 31, 1994 complaints. Order and judgment signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
